name_cn:
Best-selling LE 5A7 Shoulder Bag ♡
This year's hot vintage shoulder bag is always popular. Full leather is fine and smooth. The bag design is simple yet premium. It has enough capacity, is lightweight and practical, and is timeless. It's just perfect~
Vintage feel for posing, another viral best-seller ✔️
Model: 713938
Size: 23×22×8.5cm
